meta.note: Recent 8-K material-event filings (last 60 days) referencing Florida via SEC EDGAR full-text search. Each record carries the filer business/incorporation state and a floridaDomiciled flag — EDGAR location filters are unreliable, so Florida relevance is by full-text match. Tier 1 official.
